notes:
Ember 1.6.0 — smarter local AI, chat-title picker & phone quick-actions

• Local Ollama fixes: no more 'multimodal not supported' crash on text-only models (Ember now detects vision support, and feeds on-screen OCR text instead of an image), and tool calls a local model writes as plain text — even under invented names like 'screenshot' — now actually run instead of leaking raw JSON into the chat.
• Chat-title model picker (Settings → Models): name your chats with a tiny local Ollama model (fully offline, free) or a small free Gemma (1B/4B/12B/27B) — your call, via a dropdown.
• More models in the selector: Gemma 3 1B/4B/12B added alongside the latest Gemini & Claude.
• Phone remote quick-actions: one-tap Lock PC, Mute, Mic Off, Sleep Screen, plus a custom command box — right in Ember Link.

Also includes the Norton-style Security Dashboard + Software Updater (one 0-100 score across every protection, with prioritised fixes).
